positive: A stylized, whimsical jungle animal portrait featuring a playful jaguar cub interacting with giant bioluminescent tropical flora. The jaguar should have clean, graphic lines and striking golden-black fur against deep emerald and sapphire leaf backgrounds. Composition is highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing the cub's curiosity and the vibrant jungle elements. Style should be a mix of Art Deco poster art and modern botanical illustration, with strong, saturated colors and dramatic deep shadows. Excellent contrast and silhouette visibility. Perfect for apparel printing, clean vector-like quality.
negative: blurry, messy, text, watermark, logo, watermark, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, mutated, low-res, ugly, cartoon, photorealistic, bad perspective
